seo.title: Webheads Services

hero.desc:
From hosting to AI chatbots, app development, DRM, and payment integration.
All the services you need for e-learning, in one place.

services.title: e-Learning Hosting
services.desc:
Reliable e-learning infrastructure based on CDN, AWS, and IDC.
99.9% uptime with 24/7 monitoring for uninterrupted learning.

services.title: Maintenance
services.desc:
Dedicated technical support and incident response for LMS operations.
From routine maintenance to emergency response.

services.title: AI Chatbot
services.desc:
AI chatbot optimized for LMS instantly answers
learner questions 24/7.

services.title: Applications
services.desc:
Mobile apps specialized for e-learning,
learn anytime, anywhere.

services.title: DRM
services.desc:
DRM solutions that completely prevent piracy
and protect your valuable content.

services.title: Channel/SMS
services.desc:
Integrate Channel Talk and SMS with LMS
to automate learning reminders.

services.title: PG
services.desc:
